diagram_title: Plans vs Specs Lifecycle Refactor — C4 Component Diagram

systems.name: OpenCode Repository Workflow
systems.description: Planner and build workflow inside the repo with explicit plan/spec lifecycle boundaries.

containers.name: Planner Runtime
containers.description: Session and tooling code that creates, resolves, and validates planner artifact roots.

containers.name: Prompt And Policy Layer
containers.description: Prompt templates, skills, and AGENTS contracts that instruct agents where plans and specs live.

containers.name: Repository Artifact Layout
containers.description: The plans root, specs root, and architecture SSOT that persist planning and formalized documentation.

components.name: Planner Layout Resolver
components.description: Builds canonical planner roots and artifact paths for plan packages.

components.name: Plan Tool Lifecycle Controller
components.description: Handles plan_enter, plan_exit, template lookup, artifact validation, and mission metadata storage.

components.name: Prompt Contract Templates
components.description: Defines system-level and skill-level instructions for planner and builder behavior.

components.name: Planner Skills And Rules
components.description: Planner, agent-workflow, AGENTS, and documentation rules that encode repository artifact semantics.

components.name: Artifact Root Topology
components.description: The repository-level division between plans, formalized specs, and global architecture knowledge.

components.name: Legacy Package Triage Rule
components.description: Decision logic that classifies old dated packages by implementation evidence before migration.

relationships.description: creates and resolves active plan packages
defines planner and build mode instructions
extends system prompts with lifecycle rules
governs migration destination for legacy packages
must preserve explicit triage and no-fallback behavior
